name: Linkito
short_description: Unleash your brainpower in Linkito and ignite the insurgency! Link, build, solve, defuse, and decode by using your logic. Craft your own challenges in the level editor or tackle community creations.
detailed_description:
Linkito is a logic puzzle game all about connexions where you need to wire blocks in order to let the current flow. Progress through 80+ brainteasers and learn new mechanics along the way in diverse settings. Build machines, defuse bombs, control robots and feel the spark as you progress through a fully narrative campaign!

BE THE FIRST SPARK OF THE REVOLUTION


In campaign mode, start a new career in Albatross Technologies and discover its secrets! This enterprise (and its great leader Kane) are not what they seem and you'll have to what it seems and you'll have to counteract their plans one puzzle at a time.Use your logic to climb the corporate ladder and your insight to destroy the system from within.

DESIGN AND SHARE YOUR OWN PUZZLES


Unleash your creativity with our full-featured level editor! Craft your own unique puzzles or even design epic campaigns with multiple levels and branching. Go beyond classic level design with your own adventures, narratives, or interactive sandbox creations!

Instantly play community-made levels, unlocking unlimited content and challenges. Ready to test your logic skills and challenge others player puzzles?

GO FURTHER


Experience next-level innovation with Linkito! It connects to the real world in unprecedented ways.

You can try the Twitch-integrated campaign where viewers join forces in real-time, creating an electrifying vibe in the chat. Plus, with OSC support, you can seamlessly control music software, or use the serial port to interact with electronics. It's never been easier to create whatever you imagine in a fun and intuitive way!

GAME FEATURES


  • Just use your logic, no knowledge required

  • Various connection-based puzzles

  • Uncover the truth about Albatross Technologies in an original 50s dystopian setting

  • Complete level-editor & sandbox mode

  • Browse community created levels directly in the game

  • Connect the game to Twitch or other systems

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
